qa_pairs.question: How can one monitor the progression of a Nextflow pipeline after it has started on a compute node?
qa_pairs.answer: You can monitor the pipeline's progression by viewing the log file named `nextflow_test.<job_ID>.out` or by checking the jobs in the Slurm queue using the `sq` command or `squeue -u $USER`.

qa_pairs.question: Where can users find more detailed information about configurations and profiles in Nextflow?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can find more information about configurations in Nextflow at the official Nextflow documentation link `https://www.nextflow.io/docs/latest/config.html` and about pipeline configurations at `https://nf-co.re/docs/usage/getting_started/configuration#basic-configuration-profiles`.

qa_pairs.question: What section of the document addresses potential problems or difficulties encountered when using Nextflow?
qa_pairs.answer: The "Known issues" section of the document addresses potential problems or difficulties encountered when using Nextflow.
